response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and deep technical fluency across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or direct impact on AI-driven cloud products at scale, which are core to the role.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Strong full-stack and systems engineering across diverse tech stacks including DLang, Node.js, and cloud tooling
Proven ability to lead technical projects and share knowledge through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of AI/ML model development, deployment, or product ownership in cloud environments
Lacks documented experience in cloud platform strategy or advising enterprise customers on AI adoption
Education is a BS in CS; no advanced degree in AI or related field as preferred
